metadata.title: José Arthur | Full-Stack Developer
metadata.description: Personal portfolio of José Arthur, Brazilian full-stack developer, UI designer, and AI enthusiast.

hero.name: I'm
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · UI Designer · AI Enthusiast
hero.bio:
I build digital products with purpose, from idea to deploy.
Passionate about clean code, intelligent automation, and experiences that truly make sense for their users.

about.label: about me
about.title: Who am I?
about.photoAlt: José Arthur working at his home office
about.bio:
I'm 23 years old and passionate about technology. I build full-stack solutions focused on performance, usability, and scalability, from robust back ends to interfaces people genuinely enjoy using.

I use AI extensively in my workflow to speed up everything from architecture to final delivery. Soon I'll be in Calgary, Canada, expanding horizons while bringing my stack along.

aetherlink.desc: Smart link shortener and manager with integrated analytics and advanced URL customization.

sinfonia.name: Sinfonia da Alma
sinfonia.desc: Mentorship website with a headless CMS, blog, and dynamic landing pages for personal development journeys.
